_comment: Jinja2 templates for the news-tab commentary badges. Each scraper builds a context dict and calls scraper.commentary.render(event_type, ctx). Text is plain English, factual only — no directional labels (no 'bullish/bearish', no 'moderate/strong'). Conditional blocks use Jinja `{% if %}` so optional numbers degrade cleanly when the source didn't expose them.
ice_certified_stocks: {{ market }} certified stocks shifted by {{ delta_signed }} {{ units }} today, bringing global visible exchange inventory to {{ total }} {{ units }}.{% if grading_delta %} {{ grading_delta }} lots graded.{% endif %}{% if decert_delta and port %} {{ decert_delta }} lots decertified in {{ port }}.{% endif %}
physical_price: {{ origin }} physical cash price adjusted by {{ phys_delta_signed }} {{ currency }}/ton today while {{ benchmark }} moved by {{ futures_delta_signed }} USD/ton. {{ ratio }}% of the market change has gone into the local price.
physical_price_no_futures_move: {{ origin }} physical cash price adjusted by {{ phys_delta_signed }} {{ currency }}/ton today; {{ benchmark }} did not move on the session, so no transmission ratio is computable.
weather_risk: Agronomic Status Update: {{ origin }} ({{ provinces }}) is currently flagged as at drought risk. Forecasted rainfall of {{ forecast_mm }}mm fails to clear the safe zone threshold while satellite VHI readings register critical vegetation stress at {{ vhi }}.
weather_normal: Agronomic Status Update: {{ origin }} ({{ provinces }}) is currently flagged as normal.
daily_oi: {{ market }} Open Interest changed by {{ total_oi_delta_signed }} over the last session, with {{ nearby_delta_signed }} on nearby two contracts and {{ forward_delta_signed }} on forward contracts. Technical view: {{ price_dir_text }}, {{ regime_text }}.
kaffeesteuer: Macro Demand Signal: German Kaffeesteuer revenue for {{ period }} settled at {{ volume }} Tsd. EUR, marking a {{ mom_delta_signed }}% shift against the prior month and {{ yoy_delta_signed }}% vs. last year.
ecf_stocks: ECF Inventory Release: Total European port stocks shifted by {{ net_tons_signed }} tons over the reporting period.{% if arabica_delta is not none and robusta_delta is not none %} Type split: {{ arabica_delta_signed }} tons in Arabica and {{ robusta_delta_signed }} tons in Robusta visible inventory.{% endif %}
export_velocity: {{ origin }} shipping velocity reports {{ total_export_tons }} tons exported for the month tracking cycle. Current terminal processing reflects a pace at {{ perc_vs_seas_signed }}% vs. seasonal standard.
